summary: Complete e2e testing of Aureos AI 9-step analysis pipeline. Backend: 100% pass (14/14 tests). Frontend: All critical flows working including asset search, selection, pipeline execution, and executive report modal.
passed_tests: API root health check returns operational status
GET /api/assets/search?q=BTC returns crypto from CoinGecko
GET /api/assets/search?q=AAPL returns mock stock data
GET /api/assets/search?q=XAUUSD returns commodity data
GET /api/assets/search?q=EURUSD returns forex data
Empty query search returns empty results
POST /api/analysis/start with BTC crypto - full 9-step analysis completes
POST /api/analysis/start with AAPL stock - analysis with mock data works
POST /api/analysis/start with XAUUSD commodity - analysis completes
Market data step returns candles and source info
Technical analysis step returns RSI, MACD, trend
Probability engine returns signal direction and confidence
Analysis handles invalid/unknown assets gracefully
Analysis works without auth (returns appropriate response)
Frontend: Login flow works at /login with demo@aureos.com
Frontend: Dashboard loads with market data after login
Frontend: Navigation to /analysis page works from sidebar
Frontend: Global Asset Selector search input exists and is functional
Frontend: Typing BTC shows search results from API
Frontend: Selecting BTC shows 'Asset Confirmed' card with CRYPTO badge
Frontend: 'Start Full Analysis' button triggers analysis pipeline
Frontend: Analysis Progress bar shows 100% completion
Frontend: All 9 pipeline steps show green checkmarks when complete
Frontend: Price chart displays with support/resistance levels
Frontend: 'Executive Report' button appears after analysis completes
Frontend: Executive Report modal opens with real analysis data
Executive report shows: Signal Summary with direction (BUY/SELL/HOLD), confidence %
Executive report shows: Action Plan with entry zone, stop loss, targets
Executive report shows: Technical Indicators (RSI, MACD, Trend, Support, Resistance)
Executive report shows: Market Structure analysis
Executive report shows: Monte Carlo Results (5000 simulations, win probability)
Executive report shows: Risk Assessment with risk score and level
critical_code_review_comments: All 9 analysis steps (market_data, technical_analysis, market_structure, liquidity_mapping, monte_carlo, risk_model, causality, probability, executive_report) are properly implemented and returning data
CoinGecko API integration for crypto is working correctly
Mock data for stocks/forex/commodities is properly structured and returns expected asset types

Executive report structure matches the documented requirements with signal_summary, action_plan, technical_analysis, scenario_modeling, risk_assessment, market_causality, bullish_signals, bearish_risks
seed_data_creation: Demo user demo@aureos.com with password Demo1234! (auto-registered if not exists)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs for asset search and 9-step analysis pipeline are fully functional. Frontend analysis flow (search -> select -> analyze -> view report) is working end-to-end. CoinGecko provides real crypto data, while stocks/forex/commodities use mock data. Executive report modal displays all sections correctly.

mocked_components.note: Stocks, Forex, Commodities, and Indices use MOCK DATA. Only Crypto uses real CoinGecko API.

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. All features tested are working correctly.
